description_long: This object is a wooden pallet constructed from several thick, rectangular planks of dark-stained wood, arranged parallel on the top surface with gaps between them. The planks are fastened together with visible metal nails or screws, and the structure is reinforced by perpendicular wooden beams underneath, creating a sturdy, elevated platform. The pallet has a rugged, weathered appearance, with some visible grain and minor imperfections in the wood, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty use. The open spaces between the planks and underneath allow for easy lifting by forklifts or pallet jacks. This type of pallet is commonly used for transporting and storing goods in warehouses, loading docks, and urban storage areas. Its robust build and flat top make it suitable for stacking or supporting various items in industrial or urban environments.
description: A rugged, dark wooden pallet with parallel planks and visible fasteners, designed for heavy-duty storage and transport. The open structure allows for easy lifting and stacking in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick wooden planks and the supporting beams beneath, with visible fasteners and a slightly elevated base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open spaces beneath the pallet, allowing for forklift access and showing the full length of the top planks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the parallel planks and the sturdy, reinforced construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the open underside and the robust wooden frame.
attribute_placement_location: floor, warehouse, loading dock, garage, outdoor, stackable
